svg.title: Resume Screening System – app screenshot
svg.desc: A dark-themed Streamlit app showing the Resume Screening System UI with file upload, job description text area, and ranking output.
svg.text: Upload your resume and paste the job description to get a match score.
The first semantic match may take a few seconds while the BERT model loads.
Strong communication skills with proficiency in English (including reading, writing and
verbal communication) and an ability to clearly articulate ideas and present concepts
convincingly to a wide range of audiences.
Must be a self-starter and organized.
Strives for personal and organizational improvement.
Effective problem solving and interpersonal skills.
Strong time management skills, able to prioritize and execute tasks efficiently.
Experience with report automation or visualization tools is a plus.
Ranking multiple resumes using semantic + skill coverage.
